---
title: "Clam Dashboard"
subtitle: "Auto-updated from plate exports in data/clam"
format: html
resources:
  - output/clam/dashboard-data.csv
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(knitr)

data_path <- file.path("output", "clam", "dashboard-data.csv")

if (!file.exists(data_path)) {
  cat("## No dashboard data yet\n\n")
  cat("Run scripts/clam/build_clam_dashboard_data.R to generate data.\n")
  knitr::knit_exit()
}

dat <- readr::read_csv(data_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

if (nrow(dat) == 0) {
  cat("## Dashboard dataset is empty\n\n")
  cat("No matching plate files were discovered under data/clam.\n")
  knitr::knit_exit()
}
```

## What This Shows

- Interactive exploration of trajectories across experiments, plates, and wells.
- Two data views: raw fluorescence and delta fluorescence between consecutive timepoints.

## Interactive Explorer

Use these selectors to focus on one experiment, one plate, or specific wells.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
dashboard = await FileAttachment("output/clam/dashboard-data.csv").csv({typed: true})

cleanDashboard = dashboard.filter(d =>
  d.experiment_dir != null &&
  d.plate_id != null &&
  d.well_id != null &&
  d.well_id !== "" &&
  Number.isFinite(d.time_hr) &&
  Number.isFinite(d.value)
)

experimentValues = [...new Set(cleanDashboard.map(d => d.experiment_dir))]

experimentSortKey = (name) => {
  const m = /^([0-9]{8})/.exec(name)
  if (!m) return Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY
  return Number.parseInt(m[1], 10)
}

mostRecentExperiment = experimentValues
  .slice()
  .sort((a, b) => {
    const ka = experimentSortKey(a)
    const kb = experimentSortKey(b)
    if (ka !== kb) return kb - ka
    return a.localeCompare(b)
  })[0]

experiments = ["All", ...experimentValues]
viewof experimentSel = Inputs.select(experiments, {
  label: "Experiment",
  value: mostRecentExperiment || "All"
})

activeExperimentSel = experiments.includes(experimentSel) ? experimentSel : (mostRecentExperiment || "All")

plateCandidates = cleanDashboard
  .filter(d => activeExperimentSel === "All" || d.experiment_dir === activeExperimentSel)
plates = ["All", ...new Set(plateCandidates.map(d => d.plate_id))]
viewof plateSel = Inputs.select(plates, {
  label: "Plate",
  value: "All"
})

activePlateSel = plates.includes(plateSel) ? plateSel : "All"

selectionRows = cleanDashboard
  .filter(d => (activeExperimentSel === "All" || d.experiment_dir === activeExperimentSel) &&
               (activePlateSel === "All" || d.plate_id === activePlateSel))

wellCandidates = selectionRows
wells = [...new Set(wellCandidates.map(d => d.well_id))].sort()
defaultWells = wells.slice(0, Math.min(6, wells.length))

viewof wellSel = Inputs.select(wells, {
  label: "Well(s)",
  multiple: true,
  value: defaultWells
})

viewModes = ["Raw fluorescence", "Delta fluorescence"]
viewof dataViewSel = Inputs.select(viewModes, {
  label: "Data view",
  value: "Raw fluorescence"
})

selectedWells = (wellSel || []).filter(w => wells.includes(w))

filtered = selectionRows.filter(d => selectedWells.length === 0 || selectedWells.includes(d.well_id))

yField = dataViewSel === "Delta fluorescence" ? "delta_value" : "value"
yLabel = dataViewSel === "Delta fluorescence"
  ? "Delta fluorescence (current - previous timepoint)"
  : "Fluorescence"

plotted = filtered.filter(d => Number.isFinite(d[yField]))

Plot.plot({
  height: 420,
  grid: true,
  x: {label: "Time (hours)"},
  y: {label: yLabel},
  color: {legend: true, label: "Well"},
  marks: [
    Plot.line(plotted, {
      x: "time_hr",
      y: yField,
      stroke: "well_id",
      z: d => `${d.experiment_dir}|${d.plate_id}|${d.well_id}`
    }),
    Plot.dot(plotted, {
      x: "time_hr",
      y: yField,
      fill: "well_id",
      r: 2.5,
      tip: true
    })
  ]
})
```
